query:
UPDATE server_notifications
            SET
                title = $1,
                content = $2,
                notification_type = $3,
                priority = $4,
                target_audience = $5,
                target_user_ids = $6,
                starts_at = $7,
                expires_at = $8,
                is_dismissable = $9,
                action_url = $10,
                action_text = $11,
                updated_ts = $12
            WHERE id = $13
            RETURNING id as "id!", title as "title!", content as "content!",
                      notification_type as "notification_type!", priority as "priority!",
                      target_audience as "target_audience!", target_user_ids as "target_user_ids!",
                      starts_at as "starts_at?", expires_at as "expires_at?",
                      is_enabled as "is_enabled!", is_dismissable as "is_dismissable!",
                      action_url as "action_url?", action_text as "action_text?",
                      created_by as "created_by?", created_ts as "created_ts!", updated_ts as "updated_ts!"
